content.en:
"Good!"

Ye Tian agreed.

Ye Xingchen took the Eternal State Decree, and then prepared to open up a Star Kingdom near the Endless Kingdom.

It didn't take long.

Rumble!!!!!

The opening of the Star Realm began, and it attracted the attention of many country lords and the Eternal Dao Realm for a while.

It's only been a long time since a new eternal kingdom has been opened.

All of a sudden, a large number of Eternal Dao Realm people looked at the past, all of them to find out who was opening up the Eternal Realm.

Ye Tian quickly spoke, saying that his son was opening up the Eternal Realm.

When this news came out, all the Eternal Dao realms were extremely shocked.

After all, it was not a long time for Ye Tiancai to open up the eternal kingdom, and he sold an eternal decree to the master of the note country, so that the master of the note country opened up an eternal country, and now his son has opened up an eternal country.

That's three Eternal Decrees!

You must know that there are only dozens of eternal kingdoms in the entire alliance of the kingdom of gods, and if you change the eternal kingdoms that collapsed before, there are at most more than a hundred eternal kingdom decrees. 25

And on the side of the Ten Thousand Gods Kingdom Alliance, how many years has it taken to accumulate such a little Eternal National Order, Ye Tian has occupied three of them, and he has obtained them in a very short period of time, which is incredible.

At this time, there were still Eternal Dao Realms asking Ye Tian if there was still an Eternal National Decree.

Ye Tian's reply was naturally no, and he really didn't.

Another period of time has passed, and the opening of the Star Nation has been completed.

At this time, a group of humans were transferred to the Star Realm.

Of course.

According to the Ten Thousand Gods Kingdom Alliance, eighty percent of the territory has to be ceded to other forces after the 100 million Dao Era years, so that they can develop and improve together.

Ye Tian has no opinion on this now, but before the 100 million Dao Era years, he will definitely not let go.

......

A small meeting of the heads of state.

Ye Tian brought his son Ye Xingchen to participate.

The Lord of the Qin River Country said: "The Lord of the Ye Heaven Country is very amazing, a family of two country masters, and they have all cultivated to the Eternal Dao Body Perfection Realm!"

The other lords were also envious, even a little jealous and greedy.

Anyone can see that Ye Tian must have a secret, otherwise he would not be able to elevate his son to this level.

As for relying on Ye Xingchen himself, they didn't believe it, after all, Ye Xingchen hadn't been around for a long time since he appeared, and he hadn't been to any treasure land.

Therefore, there is a high probability that it is a resource given by Ye Tian.

However, the Ten Thousand Gods Kingdom Alliance itself did not have many opportunities, how did Ye Tian cultivate? They were very curious.

But they have been probing for a long time, and they don't know where Ye Tian came from, and they don't dare to investigate deeply, otherwise they will offend Ye Tian.

Ye Tian's current strength was comparable to the half-step Eternal Realm God Realm, and he also had multiple clones, which was equivalent to multiple half-step Eternal Realm God Realms.

If the Great Lord of the Ten Thousand Gods does not come back, no one is Ye Tian's opponent.

Therefore, they were all afraid of Ye Tian's strength, even if Ye Tian had a fate, they didn't dare to test it.

Later, they discussed the kingdom of stars.

Including the matter of eighty percent of the territory of the Star Country, Ye Xingchen naturally would not object, and agreed.

Then, they talked and chatted casually, as if it were a party.

However, just after the meeting ended, the Lord of Qinhe said, "Ladies and gentlemen, not long ago, my Master Venerable Lord of the Ten Thousand Gods sent a message and said one thing, that is, we have the hope of relocating to the realm of the Realm God Realm. "

The realm of the gods!

When many lords heard this, they were not excited, but frowned a little.

"Lord Qinhe, if you want to relocate to the realm of the Realm God Kingdom, probably only the realm of all gods can be qualified, and it is not good for us to move into the realm of the realm of the gods. Moreover, once the Kingdom of All Gods Alliance loses the Kingdom of All Gods, its strength will be greatly reduced!"

A lord said.

The Lord of Qinhe smiled and said, "Everyone, you should know that the ultimate goal of any Eternal Realm is to enter the realm of the Realm of Gods. The Eternal Realm is full of death zones, resources are scarce, and when I reach my realm, there is almost no chance to improve my strength, and only the realm of the Realm God has hope. Moreover, this can allow the entire eternal kingdom to be relocated to the realm of the gods together, if you can give up the lord of the kingdom or even join the realm of the gods, you can still enter the realm of the realm of the gods!"

On the other side, the lord of the country said: "Give up the identity of the lord of the country and join the kingdom of all gods, even if you can enter the realm of the gods in the future, you will not have any status, where is there comfort here!"

"Comfortable?" Qin He said, "You are comfortable now, but in the future, you will still face the risk of the Eternal Dao Demon Seed." Moreover, in the realm of the Realm God Kingdom, the probability of the Eternal Demon Seed being reduced by at least thirty percent, and there is still the opportunity and hope to achieve the Eternal Realm God Realm. "

At this time, many countries took the initiative to shake.

"But if we leave, the other Eternal Dao realms will still be able to stop those demon seeds, once the demon seeds explode, it will be too dangerous!" said a country lord.

The Lord of Qinhe said in a deep voice: "I'm also thinking about this problem, my idea is this, find a way to clean up all the demon seeds in the No. 2 777 Demon Seed Abyss to the No. 6 Demon Seed Abyss, even if you can pay some price, you should still be able to do it." In this way, it is only necessary to deal with the No. 1 Demon Seed Abyss with all his strength. Destroying the No. 1 Demon Seed Abyss is realistic, but it shouldn't be a problem to hit the No. 1 Demon Seed Abyss hard. Moreover, the other two half-step Eternal Realm God Realms of the Myriad Gods Alliance will leave one behind, and there is no need to worry about the problem of the Demon Seed Abyss. In addition, Lord Ye Tianguo, if you are willing to give up the Endless Realm and join the Kingdom of Ten Thousand Gods, if you are not willing to join, you can also help guard the No. 1 Demon Seed Abyss!"

"Lord of Qinhe, what is the boundary of the Realm God Kingdom?"

Ye Tian asked.

The Lord of Qinhe hurriedly said: "I almost forgot, the Lord of the Ye Heavenly Kingdom has grown up too fast, and he doesn't know much about the realm of the God Kingdom. You can understand that the realm of the gods is the upper realm of the eternal realm, in fact, before the infinite years, the eternal realm was not so strong, but in a great war, the eternal realm became the realm of death, and there were death zones everywhere, and then the eternal kingdom decree appeared, which opened up an eternal realm everywhere. In terms of resources, the resources of the Eternal Realm cannot be compared to before, so many powerhouses have relocated to the Realm God Realm......"

After the Lord of Qinhe finished speaking, Ye Tian roughly knew the situation of the Realm God Realm.
